channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: The average SpaceX buyer post-IPO is almost under water after two-day slide
item.description: Shares of SpaceX fell as much as 7% Thursday to $178, leaving the stock trading roughly in line with its volume-weighted average price of just under $180.

item.title: Vance says U.S. isn’t giving Iran ‘a cent’ as he defends Trump peace deal
item.description: "The only way the Iranians get any of these resources ... is if they comply fully" with the terms of the deal, Vice President JD Vance said.

item.title: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns
item.description: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.

item.title: Asia-Pacific markets open mixed as Iran deal faces scrutiny
item.description: Asia-Pacific markets were set to trade mixed on Friday as investors assessed the durability of a U.S.-brokered peace agreement with Iran.

item.title: Next week's inflation data just got even more important. Here's what's ahead for the market
item.description: Investors will now laser in on any signs that the central bank could hike interest rates against a backdrop of a buoyant stock market.

item.title: Markets are set for a much more hawkish Warsh Fed than expected
item.description: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh's tough talk on inflation Wednesday reverberated through financial markets.

item.title: Trump administration temporarily cuts student loan interest rates for borrowers on autopay
item.description: The Trump administration announced it will offer federal student loan borrowers who sign up for autopay a larger interest rate discount.

item.title: S&P 500 closes higher, Nasdaq climbs nearly 2% as chips fuel comeback from Fed sell-off: Live updates
item.description: Stocks closed out the holiday-shortened week in positive territory.

item.title: Amazon investigating engineers who criticized AI data center expansion
item.description: Five Amazon employees testified at Seattle City Council meetings where officials sought feedback on a year-long data center new construction pause.

item.title: U.S. Navy ends blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas
item.description: The Navy on Thursday lifted its blockade of Iran's ports and coastal areas at the direction of President Donald Trump.

item.title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
item.description: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.

item.title: Waymo recalls about 3,900 robotaxis after some drove into 'freeway construction zones'
item.description: After some Waymo robotaxis drove into closed construction zones, the company implemented a recall to fix underlying software issues.

item.title: Trump bid to fire Fed's Lisa Cook cost her more than $1M in legal, security costs: Filing
item.description: A financial disclosure from Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook details large legal and security expenses

item.title: SpaceX shares to more than double to above $400, research firm predicts
item.description: The stock move could make SpaceX the largest company in the world.

item.title: Trump DNI pick Pulte poised to get access to U.S. intelligence despite congressional bid to thwart
item.description: With President Donald Trump halting his nomination of U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton as director of national intelligence, Bill Pulte is set to take on the role.

item.title: Bears step up bets against high-yield sector, shaking up bond traders
item.description: The iShares iBoxx High Yield Corporate Bond ETF (HYG) saw elevated put volume on Thursday.

item.title: Three Saudi oil tankers carrying 6 million barrels cross Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The Saudi tankers switched their transponders on Thursday after hiding their location for more than two months.

item.title: Kalshi traders see greater than 50% odds the Fed will hike rates this year
item.description: The Federal Reserve suggested higher rates could be in the cards, and traders on Kalshi see growing odds of a hike in 2026.

item.title: NBA to begin naming winning bids for Europe teams in the coming months, deputy commissioner says
item.description: The NBA plans to begin naming winning bidders for 12 permanent European teams in the next 60 to 90 days, Deputy Commissioner Mark Tatum told CNBC.

item.title: Gas prices fall below $4 per gallon as oil supply fears ease after Iran deal
item.description: Gas prices are still 30% higher compared with what drivers paid before the U.S. and Israel attacked Iran on Feb. 28.

item.title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
item.description: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.

item.title: Before you pay for debt settlement, ask these 7 questions to find the right company
item.description: Not every debt settlement company is legit. Here's how to vet them.

item.title: Analysis: Chairman Kevin Warsh’s task forces are the key to understanding the new Fed
item.description: The new leader of the Fed left interest rates alone but made clear how he plans to rewire the central bank.

item.title: Bonkers SpaceX stats that show how staggering the money movement has been
item.description: SpaceX's first few days of trading have been filled with superlatives, from trading volume to the size of the company's first acquisition.

item.title: Wall Street recovers from Fed slump, and the next step for Amazon's AI chip ambitions
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: Intel gains 10% after Trump says company will partner with Apple on U.S. chip design
item.description: The boost continues Intel's recent rally as the chipmaker bounces back from years of headwinds.

item.title: GOP Rep. Steil pushes bill curbing members of Congress from prediction market betting
item.description: The new proposal on limits on members of Congress making such bets come as scrutiny increases on prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket.

item.title: The AI trade could shift back in Nvidia's favor. Here's why
item.description: Physical infrastructure is likely to take up a smaller share of capital expenditures in coming years relative to the core component of all that hardware – chips.

item.title: Here are the odds of SpaceX becoming the world's most valuable company
item.description: SpaceX debuted as the fifth-biggest stock. The path to third place could take years, at least according to options prices.

item.title: Godfather of AI blasts Musk's xAI as 'failure,' says labs are risking a 'big bubble explosion'
item.description: Yann LeCun's comments renew a long-running spat with Musk and cast doubt over valuations of some of the world's biggest AI companies.
